revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flag_country%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Description== {{flag country|nation|variant|size=|name=}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked article. This template is similar to the more widely used {{tl|flag}} template, but is more useful for two situations described below. '''Parameters''' *{{para|1}} (first unnamed parameter): Use either the name of the nation or in some cases, a three-letter country code (e.g. [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]]) *{{para|variant}} or {{para|2}} (optional parameter): Specifies an alternative (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. *{{para|size}} (optional): Can be used to change the flag icon size. *{{para|name}} (optional): The display text of the target wikilink is usually automatically generated, but can always be over-ridden with the name parameter. ==Usage examples== # {{flag country|ITA}} → {{flag country|ITA}} #:In this case, the country code for Italy (ITA) is used to produce the correct flag and wikilink. In many cases, it would probably be preferable to use {{tl|flag}} to produce the same result, such as {{flag|Italy}} for this example. However, {{tl|flag country}} could be used within other templates (such as infoboxes) so that country codes can be used for those template parameters. # {{flag country|ITA|1861}} → {{flag country|ITA|1861}} #:Similar to the first example, but with a flag variant parameter to select a historical flag image. (The wikilinked article is [[:en:Italy|Italy]].) # {{flag country|Kingdom of Italy}} → {{flag country|Kingdom of Italy}} #:In this example, a different [[:Category:Country data templates|country data template]] is used, to select an alternative article for the wikilink (in this case, [[:en:Kingdom of Italy|Italy]]). Compare with {{flag|Kingdom of Italy}} → {{flag|Kingdom of Italy}}, in which "Kingdom of Italy" is the display text for the wikilink. Therefore, the choice of flag country or flag depends on the desired display text; in all other respects, the templates are identical. #{{flag country|South Korea|name=Korea}} → {{flag country|South Korea|name=Korea}} ==Tracking categories== *{{Category link with count|Pages using flagcountry template with unknown parameters}} ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Produces a flag icon next to a wikilinked country name.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Nation", "description": "The name or code of the country.", "type": "string", "required": true }, "variant": { "label": "Variant", "description": "The flag variant to be displayed.", "aliases": [ "2" ], "type": "string" }, "size": { "label": "Size", "description": "The size of the flag icon.", "type": "number" } }, "paramOrder": [ "1", "variant", "size" ] } ==See also== *[[Template:Coat of arms]] *[[Template:Flag]] *[[Template:Flag icon]] - displays just the flag *[[Template:Flagu]] - displays the flag and unlinked country name *[[Template:Flaglist]] - names line up vertically in lists *[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Flag Template]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Description== {{flag country|nation|variant|size=|name=}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked article. This template is similar to the more widely used {{tl|flag}} template, but is more useful for two situations described below. '''Parameters''' *{{para|1}} (first unnamed parameter): Use either the name of the nation or in some cases, a three-letter country code (e.g. [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]]) *{{para|variant}} or {{para|2}} (optional parameter): Specifies an alternative (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. *{{para|size}} (optional): Can be used to change the flag icon size. *{{para|name}} (optional): The display text of the target wikilink is usually automatically generated, but can always be over-ridden with the name parameter. ==Usage examples== # {{flag country|ITA}} → {{flag country|ITA}} #:In this case, the country code for Italy (ITA) is used to produce the correct flag and wikilink. In many cases, it would probably be preferable to use {{tl|flag}} to produce the same result, such as {{flag|Italy}} for this example. However, {{tl|flag country}} could be used within other templates (such as infoboxes) so that country codes can be used for those template parameters. # {{flag country|ITA|1861}} → {{flag country|ITA|1861}} #:Similar to the first example, but with a flag variant parameter to select a historical flag image. (The wikilinked article is [[:en:Italy|Italy]].) # {{flag country|Kingdom of Italy}} → {{flag country|Kingdom of Italy}} #:In this example, a different [[:Category:Country data templates|country data template]] is used, to select an alternative article for the wikilink (in this case, [[:en:Kingdom of Italy|Italy]]). Compare with {{flag|Kingdom of Italy}} → {{flag|Kingdom of Italy}}, in which "Kingdom of Italy" is the display text for the wikilink. Therefore, the choice of flag country or flag depends on the desired display text; in all other respects, the templates are identical. #{{flag country|South Korea|name=Korea}} → {{flag country|South Korea|name=Korea}} ==Tracking categories== *{{Category link with count|Pages using flagcountry template with unknown parameters}} ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Produces a flag icon next to a wikilinked country name.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Nation", "description": "The name or code of the country.", "type": "string", "required": true }, "variant": { "label": "Variant", "description": "The flag variant to be displayed.", "aliases": [ "2" ], "type": "string" }, "size": { "label": "Size", "description": "The size of the flag icon.", "type": "number" } }, "paramOrder": [ "1", "variant", "size" ] } ==See also== *[[Template:Coat of arms]] *[[Template:Flag]] *[[Template:Flag icon]] - displays just the flag *[[Template:Flagu]] - displays the flag and unlinked country name *[[Template:Flaglist]] - names line up vertically in lists *[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Flag Template]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
